## [[link:/tools/97|ElevenLabs]]: Voice Cloning & Synthesis

## Murf AI: Text-to-Speech for Demos

Murf AI helps voiceover artists create quick demos and explore different delivery styles.

### Murf AI for Voiceovers
- **Professional voices**: 120+ natural-sounding AI voices
- **Customizable**: Adjust speed, pitch, and emphasis
- **Studio-quality**: Perfect for demo reels

**Try Murf AI**: https://murf.ai
